title: Manufacturing Engineer - Berger Paints Global Group - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Berger Paints Global Group - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Berger Paints Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Paints Global Group:
Berger Paints Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
